title: Level 664
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:'''█████ 664: "Embodiment of Hopelessness"'''}}{{Blurbackground|file=the void.png}}
[[File:1130-2.gif|2000px|link=]]

{{Audio|mono=yes|align=center|file=112.mp3|volume=2.5|loop=true|secrettext=Hopelessness}}
Heya, it's me, James, the researcher who supposedly went missing a few years ago. Uhh, I don't know if this thing is still working, but uhm, if it is, I would like to send a message via radio transmission to '''[[M.E.G.|M.E.G]]''' real quick to- uhm- inform them about a level I found. This place is strange. It's like an empty forest full of creatures or entities or whatever you like to call 'em, but besides that, I am stuck in an eternal, constant loop, yes, you heard me right. Whenever I try to run away or-or-or-do anything that the voice tells me to do to escape, I-I keep reappearing on this level. And then the voice just says that it might be a mistake and I should try again, and from then on, I didn't do what the voice told me. It was a bad idea. The voice just replied with "Free won't exist here," and then all my bones break until I comply. I miss my friends and family. Please, if someone hears this, avoid this monstrosity at all costs. Do not be like the many unfortunate souls who have ended up here; they are forever trapped in its haven...
{{Underline|FF0000}}
The cherry blossoms bloom in his lush garden, and they open their eyes to welcome a beautiful, warm spring day. The maple leaves fall from the trees above as the presence of the rising sun slowly illuminates the darkened sky and onto the lush green hilltops in the near distance. The birds chirped a happy choir rhythmically, and the waves of the nearby lake swiftly flowed like ballerinas dancing on a stage. The pinkish clouds reflect on the surface. A gradient, vibrant and eye-catching picture painted by Mother Nature. A sight to behold. A sight so lovely yet so incomprehensible it is perplexing. But there's a fundamental rule in the philosophical structure of thy Lord's creation itself - things always have an end. Nothing eternal is ever of value.

='''█████ 666: "Hell of the Backrooms"'''=
'''This article is a candidate for deletion!'''
Reason: The ████ is coming. █████ 666 does not exist.
[[File:Eyeshaha.webp|right|600px|thumb|link=]] '''█████ 666''', or colloquially called ████ ██ ███ ██████████ according to ancient folklore dating back to 13, is a dark, eerie, and foggy forest at night. The level, even though it is in a perpetual state of nighttime, does not seemingly have any stars or even a moon, making the atmosphere dark and the wanderer's visibility very limited. Eyes always seem to watch you from above, occasionally blinking at you or moving around. After a while of disorientation and apprehensiveness, the wanderer will hear a strange voice in the background with no traceable source. It is a deep, echoing voice, and it's seemingly the sentience of the level or an omnipresent and omniscient entity that resides within it. The supposed "goal" of the voice, as it states in it's introduction, states that it's goal is to "help wanderers survive and escape the level". However, very few wanderers have ever actually escaped the level, and those who did are mostly scarred and traumatized for life beyond repair. [[File:Lava lake.webp|right|600px|thumb|link=]] Obstacles and booby traps, usually the ones used in torture chambers or even from historical events like the Vietnam War can be scattered throughout the level. However, it is very hard to notice them at all due to the lack of visibility and the vegetation there, so it is advised to keep an eye out for any suspicious items lying around that could potentially be a trap. Red lakes of blood and lava are apparent in this level and are commonly sighted after a few minutes of exploring. When one gets closer to it, they will hear screaming and cries for help, notably resembling the wanderer's loved ones, dead or alive. However, it is not recommended to jump into the red lakes, as it is around 1150°C and will result in one sinking forever in them as the lakes have no buoyancy whatsoever. In other words, when one jumps in, they will be sinking into molten lava forever with no way out. ... ... You expected to see the rest of the page? AND LEAK IT? Well no. It's just random nonsense. There's no message for help. No, it doesn't say "Help me". You want the real page? Fine.
{{Image Banner|image=eyeshaha.webp|caption=They are observers, watching you as you suffer in agony.}} {{Alt Class|no=664|env=5|ent=5|ext=5}} '''█████ 664''' is the '''665th''' █████ of '''[[The Backrooms]]'''. ==Area I: "Embodiment of Silent Woods"== {{Blurimage Border|text-color=red|border-color=red|box-shadow-color=null|file=eyeshaha.webp|𝚏𝚒𝚐=1.0|hovertext=They are observers, watching you as you suffer in agony.|caption=They are observers, watching you as you suffer in agony.}} '''█████ 664''', also known as '''"Embodiment of Hopelessness"''' in ancient tradition dating back to the year 13, is a gloomy, eerie, and foggy forest at night. Although it is perpetually midnight, the level appears to have no stars or moon, making the atmosphere black and the wanderer's visibility extremely limited. Eyes seem to watch you from above, periodically blinking or moving around. After a period of uncertainty and apprehension, the wanderer will hear a weird voice in the background with no identifiable source. It's a deep, echoing voice, and it appears to be the level's sentience or an omnipresent and omniscient creature. The voice's supposed "goal," according to its introduction, is to "help wanderers survive and escape the level." However, very few wanderers have ever successfully exited '''█████ 664''', and those who do are usually permanently wounded and traumatized. {{Blurimage Border|text-color=red|border-color=red|box-shadow-color=null|file=Lava lake.webp|𝚏𝚒𝚐=2.0|hovertext=An image of a Lava Lake sent by Dr. James.|caption=An image of a Lava Lake sent by Dr. James.}} Obstacles and booby traps, usually the ones used in torture chambers or even from historical events like the Vietnam War, can be scattered throughout the level. However, it is very hard to notice them at all due to the lack of visibility and the vegetation there, so it is advised to keep an eye out for any suspicious items lying around that could potentially be a trap. Red lakes of blood and lava are apparent in this level and are commonly sighted after a few minutes of exploring. When one gets closer to it, they will hear screaming and cries for help, notably resembling the wanderer's loved ones, dead or alive. However, it is not recommended to jump into the red lakes, as it is around 1150°C and will result in one sinking forever in them as the lakes have no buoyancy whatsoever. In other words, when one jumps in, they will be sinking into molten lava forever with no way out. Sorry! An error has occurred in loading the page! Error Code: 666 ==Cognitohazard █████ 664== '''Cognitohazard █████ 664''' manifests as a phenomenon of seemingly random documents replacing the "level" part with "█████". This phenomenon lasts with levels between '''600 to 699'''. '''Cognitohazard █████ 664''' was designed to function as an info- and cognito-hazard. '''█████ 664''' was purposefully and heavily redacted and censored because saying, reading, or typing certain words, phrases, names, dates, times, locations, etc. will expose you to hazards. The redactions are necessary for the lore surrounding this page. DO NOT read '''█████ 664''' if you do not like redactions.
'''Aid: '''Level 664''' = █████ 664'''
{{Underline|FF0000}}{{Underline|FF0000}} '''Here is an example of this cognitohazard:''' '''█████ 664''' appears to be a/an [enclosed area] consisting of multiple long tables, chairs, lamps, and shelves of [readable objects]. The size of this [enclosed area] is [measurements cannot be disclosed, but it is not infinite]. Explorers of this [enclosed area] are encouraged to not touch the [readable objects], as several survivors insist that this might be the source of the hazard; however, this has not been confirmed. Thus far, [x ≤ 50] explorers have been exposed to this hazard, and 30% of explorers reported not interacting with the [readable objects]. This [enclosed area] consists of several [entities and/or objects], allowing for [a light source] to come in and for explorers to look outside. The time of day outside the [enclosed area] inot tos perpetually in the state of high noon. It is generally foggy or rainy outside. There have been reports of [extreme weather hazards] resulting in the sky appearing [some color] and temperatures dropping to [x ≤ 10°F or 12.2°C]. There have been reports of bloody handprints appearing on the [entity and/or object]. Explorers should not go outside the [enclosed area]. Explorers can easily avoid these entities and the environment by staying in the [enclosed area] and exploiting the ex█ts found inside. ===What to do if you find yourself in '''█████ 664'''?=== *Acknowledge you have been exposed and there is nothing you can do. *Do not stay here in '''█████ 664''' despite exposure or you will experience [symptoms related to '''█████ 664''' exposure]. Find an ex█t immediately. *Once you escape '''█████ 664''' avoid other people. If you cannot avoid other people, do not speak to anyone. If you must communicate, immediately let others know you have been exposed by writing this and only this: ===Exposed to '''█████ 664'''=== Ask for 'aid' not for h█lp. If you need anything else, draw pictures or keep your written descriptors vague and brief. Please note: As this threat evolves, there is a possibility that, if this info-hazard is not contained, you might infect other people by requesting 'aid'. Be mindful of the risk speaking in your state might bring. Your goal is to find a [member of a classified organization] and seek to be quarantined infinitely. Once quarantined, you will only be allowed to interact with other infected individuals until you succumb to exposure, or a confirmed cure is found. If you cannot find h█lp, commit to a life of solitude until you succumb or [graphic resolution cannot be disclosed], as there is no confirmed cure for exposure at this time. ==Area II: "Embodiment of Red Rooms // Leporiphobia"== {{Blurimage Border|text-color=red|border-color=red|box-shadow-color=null|file=Level -369, Door 2, Red Hallway Residency 1.jpg|𝚏𝚒𝚐=4.0|hovertext=They are observers, watching you as you suffer in agony.|caption=A red hallway, with what else? Bunnies? Oh, silly you.}} '''█████ 664's''' second area, also known as '''"Leporiphobia"''' is a big red house with wooden flooring and smooth roofing. There are paintings all over the house that either show bunnies or red roses/flowers. There's a chance the paintings appear to look distorted and melancholy. Some rooms are in different colors; mostly blue or green. The house is filled with kitchens, living rooms, bathrooms, bedrooms, and even a praying room. The praying room is dark, filled with candles and dust. Praying in the room will spawn a huge, devil-like bunny that will never appear in your sight, but will always stalk you and follow you, even in other levels of '''[[The Backrooms]]'''. The kitchen is filled with rotten food and '''[[Object 12|Liquid Pain]]''', filled with broken chairs and tables. Cracked vases can be found on the ground, along with wilted and dead flowers, as if a couple had a really bad argument and one destroyed everything. In the bedrooms, the beds are flipped, the closet doors are ripped off, and the desktops and computers are smashed and destroyed. A lonely bunny plush can be found in the corner of the bedroom. The bathrooms are infested with flies, mold, and cockroaches. The sink is cracked open, with pipes destroyed and bathtubs being destroyed. Toilets don't work and are overflowing with piss and poop. The shower handle was chopped off. The hallways are perfect and stable for unknown reasons. ==Area III: "Embodiment of Reality's End"== '''WARNING: '''LEVEL 664 DECRYPTED PAGE CAN STILL BE READ, BUT SOME TEXT WILL BE CENSORED, DUE TO THE LEVEL'S INFOHAZARD. SOME WORDS CAN HAVE SPAG ERRORS AND WEIRD TONE. SORRY FOR THIS INCONVENIENCE. {{Underline|FF0000}}{{Underline|FF0000}}{{Underline|FF0000}}{{Underline|FF0000}} {{Blurimage Border|text-color=red|border-color=red|box-shadow-color=null|file=Reality End.webp|𝚏𝚒𝚐=4.0|hovertext=This photo was taken right before the photographer was killed by an unknown entity.|caption=This photo was taken right before the photographer was killed by an unknown entity.}} '''Area III''' consists of several areas deformed in a way that looks like a bunker. Walkers who tried to go beyond the limits of the place were found disfigured with notes on their faces saying "Stay away from my house". The level has windows that show several buildings with lights on with people in them. Only one wanderer managed to return from the area outside the level's boundaries; he was found being chased by a '''[[Entity 9|Facelings]]''' with a smile drawn on the '''[[Entity 9|Facelings]]'''. ==Entities== Tons of entities can be found in '''█████ 664''', like '''[[Entity 3|Smilers]]''', '''[[Entity 8|Hounds]]''', '''[[Entity 5|Clumps]]''', '''[[Entity 9|Facelings]]''', and '''[[Phenomenon 35|Wretches]]'''. ===Princeps Obscurae=== '''Princeps Obscurae''', also theorized as the mysterious voice that resonates within the level, is a 6'0 feet tall dark, humanoid figure described by the many ancient scrolls found in the level. This is a completely theoretical and mythical entity, meaning that it has a chance to be false or misinterpreted. The scrolls characterize him as a "charismatic and sadistic force of evil", hinting at what possibly could be the entity behind the origins of this level. However, the only evidence of the entity's existence is through the ancient scrolls, meaning that no video or photographic evidence is present to support the claim. However, after extracting information from the very uncommon amount of survivors of '''█████ 664''' via surveys and interviews, '''[[M.E.G.|M.E.G]]''' was able to get some information about the mysterious figure. For now, the '''[[M.E.G.|M.E.G]]''' has reached the conclusion that is the entity is a hallucination that happens to everyone who enters the level. ===The Broken Hearted Bunny=== '''The Broken Hearted Bunny''' is one of '''█████ 664's''' entities. As mentioned before, the bunny has powers to always stalk you out of your sight. The bunny's eyes are black and cracked, with its mouth being foamy and abyss-like. The bunny can be spawned when praying in '''The Praying Room'''. Not much information is known about the entity due to most wanderers dying or going insane from the bunny. ==Colonies & Outposts== {{User:TheBackroomsMapMaker/M.E.G Notice|notice=You are not allowed to view this part of the page. Unauthorized viewing may result in termination or worse.|reason=This part contains highly confidential information.}} {{User:TheBackroomsMapMaker/RLogin|body=
The Ritual of Lucifer
The Ritual of Lucifer is a mandatory ritual which is to be done at the start of every luni-solar calendar year by the only colony in the level: An inhumane colony established by '''[[M.E.G.]]'''. The colony consists of over 700 people and is restocked with unexpecting souls if the colony runs out of test subjects. The mega-colony consists 20% of personnel, but the other 80%, the majority, are the test subjects hand-picked and kidnapped throughout all levels. Then, they are transported to the colony while being under heavy guard. If they try to resist, they are immediately thrown into the lava lakes to further please the voice. The ritual is done for the good of humanity - as long as the '''[[M.E.G.|M.E.G]]''' supplies the voice with flesh and people, it is distracted enough to deter it's attention away from the outside '''Backrooms'''. It feeds off people's pain, and the least we can do is supply the voice of it. You needn't worry, any personnel reading this - it is a temporary situation until we find the origins of the voice and eliminate it all-together.
*
Ceremony 1:
The victims, about 100-200 of them, are transported to a designated location. Then they are required to stand in a line and personnel carrying firearms are supposed to gun them down one by one. If any one of the victims manage to get away, the ritual ultimately fails. That is why we intend to do this swiftly or intoxicate the victims to minimize pain and panic.

*
Ceremony 2:
The victims' corpses' are then to be covered in '''[[Liquid Pain]]''' and then boiled and put on crosses while a pastor chants demonic, ancient prayers, making the victim's soul fly away and is ultimately consumed by the voice. The changes should be apparent. The victims' flesh will become skinnier and will start to rot away into a dark-green. Any abnormalities or differences during this procedure should be reported.

*
Ceremony 3:
After so, the victims' corpses' are skinned and buried underground in a burning coffin made out of pure gold, as to honor their sacrifices to it. If the procedure is successful, screaming and crying for help is to be heard in the sky with the voice expressing it's gratefulness to the colony. Otherwise, the procedure has failed, and the level will be nuked.

*
Ceremony Counter-measure 4:
If any of the victims manage to get away, the victims' flesh doesn't change or changes abnormally, or the voice does not show its gratitude or screaming and crying is not heard after completing the ritual, then we move on to a counter-measure. After reporting the abnormality, several task forces from neighboring levels will stand guard, and will alert other MEG bases. Then, multiple high-yield explosives will be transported to the level and will be detonated.
}} ==Entrances & Exits== ===Entrances=== There are 5 main entrances to '''█████ 664'''. *Opening a door with a 6 on it in '''[[Level 332]]''' will take one here. *Going too far in '''[[Level 666.1]]''' will send one here. *Being one of the chosen victims by '''[[M.E.G.]]''' will forcefully send one here. *Being guilty in the courtroom of '''[[Level 47]]''' can send one here. *Burning down the hotel on '''[[Level 11]]''' will send you here. ===Exits=== *There are no exits to '''█████ 664'''. {{Collapse|initial='''> Open Author & Licensing Information'''|final='''> Close Author & Licensing Information'''|body= '''Original Author:''' [[User:Codred23|Codred23]]
'''Author''': [[User:TheBackroomsMapMaker|Mr. MapMaker]]
